enums.name: AppConfigurationProvisioningState
enums.doc: The provisioning state of the configuration store.

enums.name: AppConfigurationPrivateLinkServiceConnectionStatus
enums.doc: The private link service connection status.

enums.name: AppConfigurationActionsRequired
enums.doc: Any action that is required beyond basic workflow (approve/ reject/ disconnect)

enums.name: AppConfigurationPublicNetworkAccess
enums.doc: Control permission for data plane traffic coming from public networks while private endpoint is enabled.

enums.name: DataPlaneProxyAuthenticationMode

values.name: Local
values.doc: The local authentication mode. Users are not required to have data plane permissions if local authentication is not disabled.

values.name: Pass-through
values.doc: The pass-through authentication mode. User identity will be passed through from ARM, requiring user to have data plane action permissions (Available via App Configuration Data Owner/ App Configuration Data Reader).

enums.doc: The data plane proxy authentication mode. This property manages the authentication mode of request to the data plane resources.

enums.name: DataPlaneProxyPrivateLinkDelegation

values.name: Enabled
values.doc: ARM private endpoint is required if the resource requires private link.

values.name: Disabled
values.doc: Request is denied if the resource requires private link.

enums.doc: The data plane proxy private link delegation. This property manages if a request from delegated ARM private link is allowed when the data plane resource requires private link.

enums.name: AppConfigurationCreateMode
enums.doc: Indicates whether the configuration store need to be recovered.

enums.name: ManagedServiceIdentityType

values.name: SystemAssigned,UserAssigned
values.doc: System and user assigned managed identity.

enums.doc: Type of managed service identity (where both SystemAssigned and UserAssigned types are allowed).

enums.name: createdByType

values.name: User
values.doc: The entity was created by a user.

values.name: Application
values.doc: The entity was created by an application.

values.name: ManagedIdentity
values.doc: The entity was created by a managed identity.

values.name: Key
values.doc: The entity was created by a key.

enums.doc: The kind of entity that created the resource.

enums.name: ResourceProvisioningState
enums.doc: The provisioning state of a resource type.

enums.name: IdentityType
enums.doc: The type of managed identity used. The type 'SystemAssigned, UserAssigned' includes both an implicitly created identity and a set of user-assigned identities. The type 'None' will remove any identities.

enums.name: AppConfigurationReplicaProvisioningState
enums.doc: The provisioning state of the replica.

enums.name: AppConfigurationSnapshotStatus
enums.doc: The current status of the snapshot.

enums.name: SnapshotCompositionType
enums.doc: The composition type describes how the key-values within the snapshot are composed. The 'key' composition type ensures there are no two key-values containing the same key. The 'key_label' composition type ensures there are no two key-values containing the same key and label.

enums.name: AppConfigurationResourceType
enums.doc: The resource type to check for name availability.

models.name: AppConfigurationKeyValue
models.doc: The key-value resource along with all resource properties.

properties.name: properties
properties.doc: All key-value properties.

type.name: KeyValueProperties
type.doc: All key-value properties.

properties.name: key
properties.doc:
The primary identifier of a key-value.
The key is used in unison with the label to uniquely identify a key-value.

properties.name: label
properties.doc:
A value used to group key-values.
The label is used in unison with the key to uniquely identify a key-value.

properties.name: value
properties.doc: The value of the key-value.

properties.name: contentType
properties.doc:
The content type of the key-value's value.
Providing a proper content-type can enable transformations of values when they are retrieved by applications.

properties.name: eTag
properties.doc: An ETag indicating the state of a key-value within a configuration store.

properties.name: LastModifiedOn
properties.doc: The last time a modifying operation was performed on the given key-value.

properties.name: IsLocked
properties.doc:
A value indicating whether the key-value is locked.
A locked key-value may not be modified until it is unlocked.

properties.name: tags
properties.doc: A dictionary of tags that can help identify what a key-value may be applicable for.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: Identifier of key and label combination. Key and label are joined by $ character. Label is optional.

properties.name: properties
properties.doc: All snapshot properties.

type.name: SnapshotProperties
type.doc: All snapshot properties.

properties.name: provisioningState
properties.doc: The provisioning state of the snapshot.

properties.name: status
properties.doc: The current status of the snapshot.

properties.name: filters
properties.doc: A list of filters used to filter the key-values included in the snapshot.

properties.name: key
properties.doc: Filters key-values by their key field.

properties.name: label
properties.doc: Filters key-values by their label field.

properties.name: compositionType
properties.doc: The composition type describes how the key-values within the snapshot are composed. The 'key' composition type ensures there are no two key-values containing the same key. The 'key_label' composition type ensures there are no two key-values containing the same key and label.

properties.name: CreatedOn
properties.doc: The time that the snapshot was created.

properties.name: ExpireOn
properties.doc: The time that the snapshot will expire.

properties.name: retentionPeriod
properties.doc: The amount of time, in seconds, that a snapshot will remain in the archived state before expiring. This property is only writable during the creation of a snapshot. If not specified, the default lifetime of key-value revisions will be used.

properties.name: size
properties.doc: The size in bytes of the snapshot.

properties.name: itemsCount
properties.doc: The amount of key-values in the snapshot.

properties.name: tags
properties.doc: The tags of the snapshot. NOTE: These are data plane tags, not ARM tags.

properties.name: etag
properties.doc: A value representing the current state of the snapshot.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the snapshot.

parameters.name: apiVersion
parameters.doc: The API version to use for this operation.

parameters.name: $skipToken
parameters.doc: A skip token is used to continue retrieving items after an operation returns a partial result. If a previous response contains a nextLink element, the value of the nextLink element will include a skipToken parameter that specifies a starting point to use for subsequent calls.

description.value: Lists all of the operations supported by Microsoft App Configuration.
Registers a subscription to use Microsoft App Configuration.
Unregisters a subscription from using Microsoft App Configuration.
Get the status of an operation.
Check whether the resource name is available for use.
Check whether the resource name is available for use.
Gets the properties of the specified configuration store or lists all the configuration stores under the specified resource group or subscription.

operation.value: Get Configuration Store or List Configuration Stores

description.value: Create or update a configuration store with the specified parameters.
Deletes a configuration store.
Lists the API keys for the specified configuration store.
Regenerates of the API key's for the specified configuration store.
Lists a key-value for the specified configuration store.
Gets the properties of the specified configuration store event grid filter or lists all the configuration store event grid filters under the specified configuration store.

operation.value: Get Configuration Store Event Grid Filter or List Configuration Store Event Grid Filters

description.value: Create or update a configuration store event grid filter with the specified parameters.

operation.value: Create or Update Configuration Store Event Grid Filter

description.value: Deletes a configuration store event grid filter.

operation.value: Delete Configuration Store Event Grid Filter

description.value: Retrieve all metric definitions for Microsoft App Configuration.

displayDescription.value: Total number of incoming http requests.

description.value: Read all Diagnostic Settings values for a Configuration Store.
Write/Overwrite Diagnostic Settings for Microsoft App Configuration.
Retrieve all log definitions for Microsoft App Configuration.
Validate a private endpoint connection proxy under the specified configuration store.
Get a private endpoint connection proxy under the specified configuration store.
Create or update a private endpoint connection proxy under the specified configuration store.

operation.value: Create or Update Private Endpoint Connection Proxy

description.value: Delete a private endpoint connection proxy under the specified configuration store.
Get a private endpoint connection or list private endpoint connections under the specified configuration store.

operation.value: Get Private Endpoint Connection or List Private Endpoint Connections

description.value: Approve or reject a private endpoint connection under the specified configuration store.

operation.value: Approve or Reject Private Endpoint Connection

description.value: Delete a private endpoint connection under the specified configuration store.
Auto-Approve a private endpoint connection under the specified configuration store.
Lists all the private link resources under the specified configuration store.
Reads a key-value from the configuration store.
Creates or updates a key-value in the configuration store.
Deletes an existing key-value from the configuration store.
Gets the properties of the specified deleted configuration store or lists all the deleted configuration stores under the specified subscription.

operation.value: Get Deleted Configuration Store or List Deleted Configuration Stores

description.value: Purge the specified deleted configuration store.
